query:
-- Find the Cronulla bundle item by contact name
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.customerExternalId, bi.contactName,
  c.name as customerName, c.businessName, c.customerType
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = bi.customerExternalId
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Cronulla%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Zam Cronulla%'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;
